message.content: This section lists eight photo and video editing/recording applications: InShot, Hypic, UpFoto, VivaCut, Filmora, XRecorder, BeautyCam, and Wink. It can answer questions regarding which specific software entities are categorized under the "照片视频" (Photos/Videos) topic in the document. The section contains only entity names and does not provide dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types.
